settings.title: Q Mail Accounts
settings.hint: Register your company email accounts to receive and reply from the PlanQ inbox. (Auto-sync every 5 minutes)
settings.emptyDesc: Register Gmail · Outlook · company mail or any IMAP/SMTP account
settings.confirmDeactivateDesc: Mail sync will stop but existing mail will be preserved.
settings.gmailHint: If using Gmail 2FA, you'll need an "App password" (Google Account → Security → App passwords)
settings.icloudHint: iCloud requires an "App-specific password" (Apple ID → Security)

gmail.title: Connect Gmail with an App Password
gmail.s1: First, turn on 2-Step Verification for your Google account. (App passwords require 2-Step Verification to be enabled.)
gmail.s2: Click "Create app password" below to generate a new password. Use "PlanQ" as the app name.
gmail.s3: Paste the generated 16-character password (no spaces) into the "Password" field below and save. Server settings are already filled in.

naver.title: Connect Naver Mail with an App Password
naver.s1: In Naver Mail → Settings → POP3/IMAP, turn "IMAP/SMTP" ON.
naver.s2: If you use Naver 2-Step Verification, issue an "Application password" (My Info → Security settings).
naver.s3: Enter the issued password (or your Naver login password if 2FA is off) into the "Password" field below and save.

icloud.title: Connect iCloud with an App-Specific Password
icloud.s1: Your Apple ID must have two-factor authentication enabled.
icloud.s2: Generate a new app password under "Create app password" (Sign-In and Security → App-Specific Passwords).
icloud.s3: Paste the generated app password into the "Password" field below and save.

outlook.title: Connect Outlook / Microsoft 365
outlook.s1: Turn on 2-step verification for your Microsoft account.
outlook.s2: Create an "app password" in security settings. (Regular passwords will not work)
outlook.s3: Paste the app password into the "Password" field below and save.

kakao.title: Connect Kakao Mail
kakao.s1: In Kakao Mail → Settings → IMAP/POP3, turn on "Use IMAP".
kakao.s2: Enter your Kakao account password (app password if 2-step verification is on) in the "Password" field and save.

daum.title: Connect Daum Mail
daum.s1: In Daum Mail → Preferences → IMAP/POP3, turn on "Use IMAP".
daum.s2: Enter your Daum account password in the "Password" field and save.

settings.smtpHint: If SMTP is left empty, PlanQ's default send server is used.
settings.scopeToggleLabel: Scope of the account to add
settings.teamAdminOnly: Only admins can add team mailboxes
settings.hintScope: Team mailboxes are shared in the inbox by all members; personal mailboxes are visible only to you. (Auto-sync every 5 minutes)
settings.scopeNoteTeam: Team mailbox — shared with all members in the inbox.
settings.scopeNotePersonal: Personal mailbox — visible only to you.
settings.connectFailed: Could not start Gmail connection. Please try again shortly.
settings.hintOauth: For Gmail, use "Connect with Gmail" (one click) or an app password. If one-click does not work, add the account with an app password.
settings.hintNewMailOnly: Only new mail received after connecting will appear. Past mail is not imported.
settings.fixAuthGmail: Gmail requires an app password — open "Edit" and re-enter an app password.
settings.fixAuthGeneric: Open "Edit" and re-enter the username and password.

err.gmailAppPassword: Gmail cannot be connected with a regular password. Create an app password as guided above and enter it.
err.naverAppPassword: Naver authentication failed. Check that IMAP is enabled and use an application password if 2-step verification is on.
err.msAppPassword: Microsoft authentication failed. Create an app password and enter it.
err.authFailed: Could not connect — the username or password is incorrect.
err.hostNotFound: IMAP server address not found. Please check the server address.
err.connectFailed: Could not reach the mail server. Check the server address and port.

settings.gmailOauthDenied: Google connection was not completed — you may have cancelled, or one-click connection is limited for this account until PlanQ finishes Google app review. Use the app-password method in "Add account" below.
settings.gmailOauthFailed: Gmail connection failed: {{code}} — try again later or use the app-password method.
settings.teamMemberHintHead: Only admins can add shared company mailboxes. For personal email, connect it from
settings.appPasswordPh: Not your account password — the generated app password

reply.aiGated: AI replies aren't suggested for automated · marketing mail

context.noActivity: No activity on other channels yet.
context.linkClientHint: Link a customer to see their chats, tasks, and invoices here.
context.tasksHint: Automatically pull action items from the email into Q Task.
context.tasksGated: Tasks aren't extracted from automated · marketing mail.
context.usageLimit: AI usage limit for this month reached.
context.summaryHint: AI summarizes long threads into key points.

noAccount.title: No mail account connected yet
noAccount.desc: Connect a Gmail or IMAP account to read and reply to your mail inside Q Mail. Connect multiple accounts to view them by address.
